## Summary

What does this PR change and why?

## Type of change

- [ ] New skill
- [ ] Skill improvement
- [ ] Build system / tooling
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Bug fix

## Checklist

- [ ] Edited the `.tmpl` file, not the generated `.md`
- [ ] Ran `bash _build/build-skills.sh`
- [ ] Committed both the `.tmpl` and the generated `.md`
- [ ] If new skill: added the name to `SKILLS=(...)` in `_build/build-skills.sh`
- [ ] Skill handles the no-brain case gracefully
- [ ] Skill description includes concrete trigger phrases
- [ ] No client names, personal paths, or private data in the content
- [ ] Tested the skill locally in Claude Code

## Philosophy check

- [ ] Enhances the creative process, does not generate creative output
- [ ] Supports the input side
- [ ] Professional but not corporate tone
- [ ] Respects practitioner expertise

## Notes for the reviewer

Anything specific you want eyes on? Any open questions?
